languages.text: "Оксильда Таванти в первую очередь интересуется происхождением видов, механизмами эволюции — и вмешательством в ее ход. По большей части ее интересы обычно не находит практического применения. С другой стороны, ее верность Поиску Знания иногда приводит к открытиям биологических мистерий".

"Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."
languages.original_text: "Оксильда Таванти в первую очередь интересуется происхождением видов, механизмами эволюции — и вмешательством в ее ход. По большей части ее интересы обычно не находит практического применения. С другой стороны, ее верность Поиску Знания иногда приводит к открытиям биологических мистерий".

traits.locale_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

"Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

"Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

languages.text: 「オキシルダ・タヴァンテは、種の起源や進化のメカニズム、そしてその過程に干渉することに興味を持っている。彼女の興味のほとんどは実用的な応用を見ない。しかし、知識の追求への献身は、生物学の謎を解明する突破口を導くこともある」
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: オキシルダ・タヴァンテは、種の起源や進化のメカニズム、そしてその過程に干渉することに興味を持っている。彼女の興味のほとんどは実用的な応用を見ない。しかし、知識の追求への献身は、生物学の謎を解明する突破口を導くこともある。

languages.text: «Oksilda Tavanti está interesada principalmente en el origen de las especies, los mecanismos de evolución... e interferir con su desarrollo. La inmensa mayoría de sus intereses no encuentran aplicación práctica. Dicho eso, su devoción a la búsqueda del conocimiento a veces conduce a importantes descubrimientos sobre los misterios biológicos».
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: «Oksilda Tavanti está interesada principalmente en el origen de las especies, los mecanismos de evolución... e interferir con su desarrollo. La inmensa mayoría de sus intereses no encuentran aplicación práctica. Dicho eso, su devoción a la búsqueda del conocimiento a veces conduce a importantes descubrimientos sobre los misterios biológicos».

languages.text: “奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂主要研究物种起源和进化机制——以及对进化过程的干预。她的绝大多数研究并无实际用途。不过，她那份对求知远征的执着，有时确实能突破生物学奥秘。”
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: “奥克西尔达·塔凡蒂主要研究物种起源和进化机制——以及对进化过程的干预。她的绝大多数研究并无实际用途。不过，她那份对求知远征的执着，有时确实能突破生物学奥秘。”

languages.text: "Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich primär für den Ursprung der Spezies, die Mechanismen der Evolution – und deren Manipulation. Der Großteil ihrer Interessen findet keine praktische Anwendung. Allerdings führt ihre Begeisterung für die Suche nach Wissen mitunter zu Durchbrüchen hinsichtlich biologischer Mysterien."
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: "Oksilda Tavanti interessiert sich primär für den Ursprung der Spezies, die Mechanismen der Evolution – und deren Manipulation. Der Großteil ihrer Interessen findet keine praktische Anwendung. Allerdings führt ihre Begeisterung für die Suche nach Wissen mitunter zu Durchbrüchen hinsichtlich biologischer Mysterien."

languages.text: "Oksilda Tavanti; öncelikle türlerin kökeni, evrim mekanizmaları ve onun seyrine müdahale etmekle ilgileniyor. İlgi alanlarının büyük çoğunluğunun pratik bir uygulaması yok. Yine de İrfan Arayışı'na olan bağlılığı bazen biyolojik gizemlerde atılımlara yol açmaktaymış."
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: "Oksilda Tavanti; öncelikle türlerin kökeni, evrim mekanizmaları ve onun seyrine müdahale etmekle ilgileniyor. İlgi alanlarının büyük çoğunluğunun pratik bir uygulaması yok. Yine de İrfan Arayışı'na olan bağlılığı bazen biyolojik gizemlerde atılımlara yol açmaktaymış."

languages.text: « Oksilda Tavanti se passionne pour l'origine des espèces, les mécanismes de l'évolution... et les techniques permettant d'altérer son cours. Bon nombre de ses travaux ne trouvent aucune application pratique. Cela dit, son dévouement à la Quête de la Connaissance la mène parfois à de grandes découvertes dans le domaine des mystères biologiques. »
languages.original_text: "Oksilda Tavanti is primarily interested in the origin of species, the mechanisms of evolution — and in interfering with its course. The vast majority of her interests find no practical application. Then again, her devotion to the Quest for Knowledge sometimes leads to breakthroughs in biological mysteries."

traits.locale_text: « Oksilda Tavanti se passionne pour l'origine des espèces, les mécanismes de l'évolution... et les techniques permettant d'altérer son cours. Bon nombre de ses travaux ne trouvent aucune application pratique. Cela dit, son dévouement à la Quête de la Connaissance la mène parfois à de grandes découvertes dans le domaine des mystères biologiques. »
